attributes.description: Alerts when znode count exceeds 1,000,000. Large counts slow startup and recovery.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Excessive znode count

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper excessive znode count

### What fired
Znode count exceeded 1,000,000 during the window.

### Why it matters
Million-plus znodes stretch ZooKeeper beyond its design sweet spot — startup, snapshots, and replication all slow.

### Triage
1. Identify the clients producing many znodes.

### Remediation
- Redesign the data model.

### Tuning
- 1M threshold matches the documented guidance.
